page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.6xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance features 24 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 24 vCPUs. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached options. It also lacks GPU hardware accelerators. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 15 Gbps. The server operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute performance without resource sharing at the CPU level. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes this instance suitable for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, and moderate database operations that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.6xlarge is a general-purpose server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance provides 24 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, mapping to 24 vCPUs, and is configured with 96.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 15 Gbps and runs on the KVM hypervisor. Notable hardware tradeoffs include the complete absence of local storage and GPU accelerators, requiring reliance on network-attached storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance for general-purpose workloads such as application hosting, web serving, and enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.6xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8475B vCPUs, 96.0 GB of RAM, 15 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage.

tagline: A dedicated 24-core x86_64 server with a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and baseline 15 Gbps networking, requiring network-attached storage.
bullet_points: 24 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8475B cores with 1 thread per core
96.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per vCPU
15 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage volumes
Zero GPU accelerators and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Suitable for general-purpose application hosting and web serving
